title: Phase 1: Foundation Infrastructure - IC Canister Architecture with Vehicle Data System

requirements.text: Implement stable canister storage architecture with persistent blob storage for media assets that survives refresh, rebuild, redeploy, and upgrade operations

quotes: STABLE CANISTER STORAGE + BLOB PERSISTENT STORAGE
Media harus survive: Refresh, Rebuild, Redeploy, Upgrade

acceptanceCriteria: Stable storage containers declared and bound to canister memory
Blob storage persistence layer active
Media assets survive canister upgrades
No in-memory, temporary, session, or Base64 storage used

requirements.text: Implement deterministic blob storage binding with public HTTPS gateway resolver using URL pattern /media/{collection}/{assetId}/{fileName}, including file hash fingerprint and URL integrity validation

quotes: URL deterministic: /media/{collection}/{assetId}/{fileName}
File hash fingerprint, URL integrity validation

acceptanceCriteria: Stable blob container declared
Media index mapping active
Deterministic URL resolution works
File hash fingerprints generated and validated

requirements.text: Create stable canister database with auto-persistent and upgrade-safe collections: passengerVehicles, commercialVehicles, promotions, testimonials, blogPosts, contacts, creditSimulations, visitorStats, mediaAssets, adminUsers, websiteSettings, productLikes, productShares, articleLikes, articleShares, articleComments

quotes: Create base collections: passengerVehicles, commercialVehicles, promotions, testimonials, blogPosts, contacts, creditSimulations, visitorStats, mediaAssets, adminUsers, websiteSettings

acceptanceCriteria: All 16 collections created with stable storage binding
Collections persist across canister upgrades
Database mapping is deterministic and upgrade-safe

requirements.text: Implement visitorStats collection with fields: id, totalVisitors, dailyVisitors, yesterdayVisitors, weeklyVisitors, monthlyVisitors, yearlyVisitors, onlineVisitors, pageViews, lastUpdated (timestamp, auto-updates on events), and optional advanced tracking fields (uniqueIPs, referrerSources, deviceStats, browserStats, locationStats)

quotes: Collection: visitorStats ... totalVisitors, dailyVisitors, yesterdayVisitors, weeklyVisitors, monthlyVisitors, yearlyVisitors, onlineVisitors, pageViews, lastUpdated

acceptanceCriteria: visitorStats collection created with all required fields
Auto-update mechanism for lastUpdated timestamp
Optional advanced tracking fields structure in place

requirements.text: Implement websiteSettings collection with fields: id, siteName, mainBannerImageId (reference to mediaAssets.id), ctaBannerImageId, dealerLogoId, contactPhone, contactWhatsapp, contactEmail, dealerAddress, operationalHours, facebookUrl, instagramUrl, tiktokUrl, youtubeUrl, lastUpdated (timestamp, auto-updates on change)

quotes: Collection: websiteSettings ... siteName, mainBannerImageId, ctaBannerImageId, dealerLogoId, contactPhone, contactWhatsapp, contactEmail, dealerAddress, operationalHours, facebookUrl, instagramUrl, tiktokUrl, youtubeUrl, lastUpdated

acceptanceCriteria: websiteSettings collection created with all fields
Media asset references properly linked
Auto-update timestamp mechanism active

requirements.text: Create passenger vehicle relational data layer with collections: passengerVehicles (id, vehicleName, slug, description, basePrice, thumbnailMediaId, brochureMediaId, publishStatus), passengerVehicleVariants (id, vehicleId, variantName, price, isPremium, displayOrder), passengerVehicleColors (id, vehicleId, colorName, colorHex, thumbnailMediaId, isActive), passengerVehicleVariantColorMapping (id, vehicleId, variantId, colorId, isDefault, displayOrder), passengerVehicleImages (id, vehicleId, variantId, colorId, mediaId, angle, backgroundType), passengerVehicleSpecifications, passengerVehicleFeatures

quotes: Create collections: passengerVehicles, passengerVehicleVariants, passengerVehicleColors, passengerVehicleVariantColorMapping, passengerVehicleImages, passengerVehicleSpecifications, passengerVehicleFeatures

acceptanceCriteria: All 7 passenger vehicle collections created with specified fields
Relational references properly bound (vehicleId, variantId, colorId)
Media references linked to mediaAssets collection

requirements.text: Create commercial vehicle relational data layer with collections: commercialVehicles (id, vehicleName, slug, categoryId, description, basePrice, thumbnailMediaId, brochureMediaId, publishStatus), commercialVehicleCategories (id, categoryName, displayOrder), commercialVehicleVariants (id, vehicleId, variantName, price, displayOrder), commercialVehicleVariantMapping (id, vehicleId, variantId), commercialVehicleVariantImages (id, vehicleId, variantId, mediaId, angle), commercialVehicleSpecifications, commercialVehicleFeatures - with no color system

quotes: Create collections: commercialVehicles, commercialVehicleCategories, commercialVehicleVariants, commercialVehicleVariantMapping, commercialVehicleVariantImages, commercialVehicleSpecifications, commercialVehicleFeatures
NO COLOR SYSTEM

acceptanceCriteria: All 7 commercial vehicle collections created with specified fields
No color-related fields in commercial vehicle schema
Category binding properly implemented
Variant mapping collection links vehicles to variants

requirements.text: Implement nested CMS data hierarchy for passenger vehicles with cascade delete and relational integrity: Vehicle → [Variants, Colors, Variant-Color Mapping, Interactive Images, Specifications, Features, CTA Config], all children bound by vehicleId with no orphan records allowed

quotes: Passenger Vehicle ├─ Variants ├─ Colors ├─ Variant-Color Mapping ├─ Interactive Images ├─ Specifications ├─ Features └─ CTA Config
Semua child bind by vehicleId, Cascade delete enabled, Relational integrity lock, No orphan records allowed

acceptanceCriteria: Cascade delete triggers implemented for passenger vehicle hierarchy
Relational integrity constraints enforce vehicleId binding
Orphan record prevention logic active
All child records properly linked to parent vehicle

requirements.text: Implement nested CMS data hierarchy for commercial vehicles with cascade delete and relational integrity: Vehicle → [Category, Variants, Variant Mapping, Variant Images, Specifications, Features, CTA Config] with no color layer, variant images per variant, and category routing binding ready

quotes: Commercial Vehicle ├─ Category ├─ Variants ├─ Variant Mapping ├─ Variant Images ├─ Specifications ├─ Features └─ CTA Config
No color layer, Variant image per variant, Category routing bind ready

acceptanceCriteria: Cascade delete triggers implemented for commercial vehicle hierarchy
Relational integrity constraints enforce vehicleId binding
Category routing binding structure in place
No color-related fields or references exist

requirements.text: Implement stable memory mapping binding: Collection → Stable segment, Variant mapping → Stable relational index, Media binding → Stable blob index, Counter → Stable write lock

quotes: Bind mapping: Collection → Stable segment, Variant mapping → Stable relational index, Media binding → Stable blob index, Counter → Stable write lock

acceptanceCriteria: Collections bound to stable memory segments
Relational indices stored in stable memory
Blob index persisted in stable storage
Write-lock counters use stable memory

Password hash, Session persistence, Auth guard ready, Role schema, Scope: Super Admin

Session persistence mechanism active
Auth guard functions implemented and ready for use
Role schema includes Super Admin role

requirements.text: Implement canister lifecycle hooks pre_upgrade() and post_upgrade() with snapshot and restore functionality for: Vehicles, Variants, Colors, Mapping, Images, Specs, Features, Media, Users, Counters using stable binary mapping serialization format

quotes: Implement: pre_upgrade() post_upgrade()
Snapshot: Vehicles, Variants, Colors, Mapping, Images, Specs, Features, Media, Users, Counters
Format: Stable binary mapping

acceptanceCriteria: pre_upgrade() hook captures all listed data structures
post_upgrade() hook restores all data structures
Relational passenger data serialized correctly
Relational commercial data serialized correctly
Stable binary format used for serialization

requirements.text: Implement media library backend manager with blob-only operations: Upload, Replace, Delete, and Index binding - no Base64 or browser blob URLs

quotes: Media Manager backend: Upload, Replace, Delete, Index bind, Blob only

acceptanceCriteria: Upload function stores media as persistent blob
Replace function updates existing blob entries
Delete function removes blob and index entry
Index binding links media to collections
No Base64 encoding or browser blob URLs used

requirements.text: Implement deployment safety lock to prevent modification of: Storage binding, DB mapping, Vehicle relations, Media index, Auth system during deployment operations

quotes: Deploy tidak boleh mengubah: Storage binding, DB mapping, Vehicle relations, Media index, Auth system

acceptanceCriteria: Storage binding immutable during deployment
Database mapping structure locked
Vehicle relational schema protected
Media index structure preserved
Auth system configuration remains unchanged

constraints: Do not generate any public website UI components or routes
Do not create router system or listing/detail page UI
Do not create admin dashboard visual interface or CMS frontend layout
Do not use in-memory, temporary, session storage, Base64 media, or blob browser URLs
Commercial vehicles must not have any color system implementation
All media assets must survive refresh, rebuild, redeploy, and upgrade
Deployment operations must not modify storage binding, DB mapping, vehicle relations, media index, or auth system
nonGoals: Public website rendering or visual components
Vehicle listing or detail page UI
Any temporary or non-persistent storage mechanisms
